title: Rest House Booking in MCF/Raebareli
contentHtml:
At Present, ORHs situated in the following places are in operation in MCF/Raebareli 

  1. Officer Rest House (MANDAR, GANDHMADAN AND TTH) at MCF Premises
  2. Officer’s and subordinate Rest Houses at Langara Phatak, PME office, Lucknow
  3. Officer’s Rest House and subordinate rest houses at State Entry Road, New Delhi
  4. Officer’s Rest House at Thomson Road, New Delhi

 The procedure for booking of accommodation at the ORH in MCF are in offline mode. In this purpose FORM is available o­n the MCF website and send to dgmmcfrbl@gmail.com OR adgmmcfrbl@gmail.com

  1. ​Railway Officers may forward the application in prescribed format for booking of ORH via mail/eoffice/Dak/whatsapp.
  2. Upon receipt of application, allotment will be done by Dy.GM’s office subject to availability of rooms.
  3. Allotted room and ORH will be intimated to the applicant in due course by Dy. GM’s Office.
  4. Payment: Charges will be levied as per extent rules.
  5. Purpose of visit should be mentioned in the application.

Contact Nos./email ID of Officials in connection with Booking of ORH in MCF/RBL

DGM 7318060002
ADGM 7318060615
Sr.Clerk/ORH 7080302704

Email:  dygmg@mcfrbl.railnet.gov.inor adgmmcfrbl@gmail.com

 **The procedure for booking of accommodation at the ORH in MCF are in offline mode. In this purpose FORM is available o­n the MCF website and send to dgmmcfrbl@gmail.com OR** [**adgmmcfrbl@gmail.com**](mailto:adgmmcfrbl@gmail.com)

2.  Upon receipt of application, allotment will be done by Dy.GM’s office subject to availability of rooms.
3.  Allotted room and ORH will be intimated to the applicant in due course by Dy. GM’s Office.
4.  Payment: Charges will be levied as per extent rules.
